Notes: CU ranked No. 6 in region..CU's 11th straight victory..SMSU leads 49-38 with
9:49 remaining in game, before CU rallies with 15-0 run in next four minutes..
SMSU misses game-tying shot with six seconds on clock..CU's 15th straight
Game.Officials: Amy Brighton,  Steve Dengerud,  Seth Hansen
